---
title: "Contact"
---

**Water Boards Openscapes Leads**

-   Anna Holder, Open Data Science, Equity & Tribal Coordinator, OIMA
-   Devan Burke, Environmental Scientist, OIMA
-   Elena Suglia, Environmental Scientist, OIMA
-   Tina Ures, Engineering Geologist, DWQ

**Executive Sponsors**

-   Greg Gearheart, Deputy Director, OIMA
-   Andrew Hamilton, Assistant Deputy Director, OIMA
-   Annalisa Kihara, Assistant Deputy Director (Groundwater Quality Branch), DWQ
-   Nick Martorano, Assistant Deputy Director (Surface Water Quality Branch), DWQ
